description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical water tower elevated on a sturdy metal framework with four angled support legs. The main tank is ribbed and metallic, capped with a conical dark roof. A vertical ladder is attached to one side, providing access from the ground to the tank. The structure is utilitarian, with no visible windows or decorative elements, and is designed for functionality and durability. The metal framework is open, allowing visibility through the legs, and the tank appears to be sealed. The overall appearance is industrial, typical of water towers found in urban or suburban environments.
description: A tall, ribbed metal water tower on a four-legged steel frame with a conical roof and an attached ladder. The design is utilitarian and industrial, with no windows or decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical tank, conical roof, and the full ladder attached to the left support leg.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ladder running vertically along the left side and the open metal framework beneath the tank.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tank and support structure without the ladder visible, emphasizing the symmetry of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the ladder now on the right, showing the open framework and the tank's ribbed surface.
